states.name: Mirai
states.title: Halloween Idol
states.description: Mirai has a special song that she sings only once a year. No matter how cruel the world may be, on that day, she wants everyone to enjoy candy and dressing up in strange costumes. She wants to give them a chance to smile.

states.name: Mirai
states.title: Halloween Idol
states.description: When her concert is finally over, Mirai stealthily goes to enjoy the festival. After growing up in a poor home, the endless rows of candies seem like a dream to her. A little embarrassed, a little happy, she takes as much as she likes.

states.name: Mirai
states.title: Halloween Idol
states.description:
After the festival, she returns to her room. Her eyes are heavy and her feet are sore, but she can still hear people's cheers ringing in her mind. People's hopes, and the laughter of children, rise as if from the grave. She smiles to herself, alone in her room.
"Trick or treat."
